description_long: This is a dark, elongated stone with a pointed tip and a broad, flat base, resembling a primitive tool or projectile point. The surface is mostly matte and rough, with visible natural texture and some minor irregularities along the edges. One side of the stone features a white alphanumeric marking, likely an identification code, which stands out against the dark background. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or inclusions. Its coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with subtle lighter streaks and patches. The overall form is asymmetrical, with one edge more sharply defined than the other, suggesting it may have been shaped or fractured intentionally.
description: A dark, pointed stone with a rough, matte surface and a white identification code on one side. Its asymmetrical, elongated shape and dense appearance suggest it is a solid, natural object.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the stone's thin profile and pointed tip.
description_view_1: A broad, flat view displaying the full length of the stone and the white identification code.
description_view_2: Another narrow side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the stone's thickness and surface texture.
description_view_3: A view from the base, showing the stone's width and the uneven, rough bottom surface.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or used as a loose obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: No regular pattern; natural mottling and subtle streaks with a hand-written white code on one side.
attribute_weathering: Surface is rough and matte, with minor edge chipping indicating some exposure but not extensive weathering.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with paved or manicured urban surfaces, but could blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements.
